zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund Poley於1486年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可巴德利時，他的父親Henry Poley47歲，母親Constance Gedding33歲。他於1520年與Mirabelle Garneys在英國英格蘭素福爾可簡頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1548年12月31日在他的家鄉享年62歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可巴德利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edmund Poley于1486年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可巴德利时，他的父亲Henry Poley47岁，母亲Constance Gedding33岁。他于1520年与Mirabelle Garneys在英国英格兰素福爾可簡頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1548年12月31日在他的家乡享年62岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可巴德利。

nameMeanings.name: Poley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (Nord): from a variant of Polet, a vernacular pet form of the personal name Paul . This surname is very rare in France.
East German: habitational name from a place so named near Frankfurt on the Oder.

variants.name: Paul
meanings: English, French, German, Dutch, Swedish, West Indian (mainly Haiti, also e.g. Saint Lucia), and African (mainly Nigeria and Tanzania): from the personal name Paul (from Latin Paulus ‘small’), which has always been popular in Christendom. It was the name adopted by the Pharisee Saul of Tarsus after his conversion to Christianity on the road to Damascus in about AD 34. He was a most energetic missionary to the Gentiles in the Roman Empire, and played a very significant role in establishing Christianity as a major world religion. The name was borne also by numerous other early Christian saints. It is also occasionally borne by Jews; the reasons for this are not clear. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages and their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Greek Pavlis , Slovenian Pavel and Pavlič (see Pavlic ), Polish Paweł (see Pawel ) and Pawlicki , Assyrian/Chaldean Polous and Polus . In France, this surname is most common in Brittany (see 2 below).
Breton (mainly Finistère): from a Frenchified form of the personal name Paol, Breton form of Paul .
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Phóil ‘son of Paul’. Compare McFall .

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund Poley was born in 1486, in Badley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Henry Poley, was 47 and his mother, Constance Gedding, was 33. He married Mirabelle Garneys in 1520, in Kenton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 31 December 1548, in his hometown, at the age of 62, and was buried in Badley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund Poley est né en 1486, à Badley, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry Poley, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Constance Gedding, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Mirabelle Garneys en 1520, à Kenton, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 31 décembre 1548, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Badley, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edmund Poley 1486 in Badley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Poley 47 und seine Mutter Constance Gedding 33. Er hat 1520 in Kenton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Mirabelle Garneys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 31. Dezember 1548 im Alter von 62 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Badley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Poley è nato il nel 1486 nel Badley, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Henry Poley, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Constance Gedding, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Mirabelle Garneys nel 1520, nel Kenton, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 31 dicembre 1548, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Badley, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Edmund Poleyが1486年にイギリスイギリススフォルクバドリーで生まれた時，父Henry Poleyは47歳，母Constance Geddingは33歳であった。1520年にイギリスイギリススフォルクケントンでMirabelle Garneysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1548年12月31日に故郷で62歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクバドリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Poley(이)가 1486년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 바들리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Poley(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Constance Gedding(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1520년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 켄턴에서 Mirabelle Garneys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1548년 12월 31일 그의 고향에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 바들리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Poley nasceu em 1486, em Badley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry Poley, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Constance Gedding, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Mirabelle Garneys em 1520, em Kenton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 31 de dezembro de 1548, em sua cidade natal, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Badley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund Poley родился в 1486 г. в местности бадли, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Henry Poley было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Constance Gedding, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Mirabelle Garneys в 1520 г. в местности кэнтон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер 31 декабря 1548 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности бадли, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edmund Poley nació en 1486, en Badley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry Poley, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Constance Gedding, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Mirabelle Garneys en 1520, en Kenton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 31 de diciembre de 1548, en su pueblo, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Badley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
